extension.summary: Main resolvers, useful for converting html/js into playable content from various hosts (Greek ones).
extension.description: Main resolvers, useful for converting html/js into playable content from various hosts (Greek ones).
extension.news:
Version 0.1.16 (May 18th, 2026) - Add back experimental Dailymotion plugin - Remove temporary vidmoly plugin
Version 0.1.15 (May 18th, 2026) - Add vimoly, faster distribution
Version 0.1.14 (May 17th, 2026) - Update regex pattern for greekfun
Version 0.1.13 (May 15th, 2026) - Update regex pattern for greekfun
Version 0.1.12 (May 13th, 2026) - Update Mega plugin to pass websocket url to AliveGR's proxy
Version 0.1.11 (May 04th, 2026) - Remove dailymotion plugin (use master ResolveURL one instead) - Add greekfun plugin
Version 0.1.9 (April 30th, 2026) - Another dailymotion fix (hopefully by renaming class and resolver name might fix confusion with internal resolver)
Version 0.1.8 (April 27th, 2026) - Another dailymotion fix
Version 0.1.7 (April 26th, 2026) Fixes for: - Rik plugin - Dailymotion plugin
Version 0.1.6 (April 24th, 2026) - Add hdvid plugin
Version 0.1.5 (April 24th, 2026) - Improve grnet plugin
Version 0.1.4 (April 19th, 2026) - Push voe.sx, upstream takes too long
Version 0.1.3 (April 18th, 2026) - Push voe.sx, upstream takes too long
Version 0.1.2 (April 10th, 2026) - Push bitchute plugin, upstream takes too long
Version 0.1.1 (April 9th, 2026) - Updated AlphaGR plugin
Version 0.1.0 (April 6th, 2026) - Updated the following plugins > AlphaGR > Ant1CY > Ant1GR (which no longer includes the live stream as it's directly passed from the live playlist) > Mega (which no longer includes the live stream as it's directly passed from the live playlist) > Skai > Star
New Plugins: > ARTlive > Dailymotion (which overrides official ResolveURL plugin by passing the parent m3u8 manifest directly to the player) > Euronews > Twitch (which includes API client key to make deployment easier)
Removed the following: > ERT was removed (ERTflix has introduced changes accross the board making it way too hard to implement one)
